import httpx
from typing import AsyncIterator


async def iter_all_users(client: httpx.AsyncClient) -> AsyncIterator[dict]:
    page = 1
    while True:
        resp = await client.get(f"/api/users?page={page}")
        data = resp.json()
        if not data["users"]:
            break
        for user in data["users"]:
            yield user
        page += 1


async def fetch_user_batch(client: httpx.AsyncClient, user_ids: list) -> list:
    async def _fetch_one(uid: int):
        resp = await client.get(f"/api/users/{uid}")
        return resp.json()

    return await asyncio.gather(*[_fetch_one(uid) for uid in user_ids])


async def process_users(client: httpx.AsyncClient):
    async for user in iter_all_users(client):
        await handle_user(user)
